rule CDB_CVE202616076__AstrBotDevs_AstrBot_API_op {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-16076 - AstrBotDevs AstrBot API open_api.py OpenApiRoute.chat_send auth"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-18"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-16076" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "AstrBotDevs" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "AstrBot" ascii wide nocase
        $kw2 = "OpenApiRoute" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 208 threat advisories. Of these, 12 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 79 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
